description: Wizards, sorcerers, and practitioners of the arcane arts.
jobs: Guild Master
A chain-of-office-wearing leader setting dues, standards, and apprentice quotas for the guild.
Magician
A cape-flourishing showman performing sleight-of-hand tricks and staged illusions for coins.
Conjurer
Quick hands producing rabbits, scarves, and flashes of light from seemingly empty air.
Alchemist
A crucible-heating seeker of transmutation, mixing reagents to turn lead into gold.
Wizard
A tome-hunched scholar memorizing complex spells to bend reality through sheer knowledge.
Sorcerer
Raw arcane power crackling through the blood, channeled without need for books or study.
Sorceress
Innate energy surging at her fingertips, shaped by instinct rather than formal training.
Witch
A hedge-dwelling brewer of potions and whispered curses learned from grandmother's grimoire.
Warlock
A pact-bound channeler drawing forbidden power from an otherworldly patron's dark bargain.
Mage
A staff-carrying generalist casting spells across multiple schools of versatile arcane power.
Archmage
A tower-dwelling master of the deepest mysteries, advising kings and shaping world events.
Court Wizard
A velvet-robed advisor providing magical counsel, enchantments, and protection to a noble house.
Battle Mage
A scorched-robe warrior hurling fireballs and lightning on the front lines beside soldiers.
Necromancer
A pallid ritualist raising corpses, speaking to the dead, and binding spirits with dark words.
Oracle
A trance-falling mystic speaking cryptic prophecies from within a temple sanctum.
Prophet
A wild-eyed visionary proclaiming divine warnings of what is to come.
Seer
A distant-gazing mystic peering into shimmering pools or crystal spheres to glimpse far events.
Fortune Teller
A velvet-draped card spreader selling glimpses of what fate may hold for a few coins.
Diviner
A rune-casting seeker of hidden truths, swinging pendulums and interpreting arcane signs.
Enchanter
A silver-threaded weaver of lasting spells into rings, blades, and cloaks that glow with power.
Enchantress
A whisper-lipped beguiler charming minds and senses with spells of fascination.
Summoner
A chalk-circle-drawing chanter pulling creatures from other planes by speaking their true names.
Elementalist
A storm-eyed commander bending fire, water, earth, and air to their will.
Illusionist
A shimmer-weaving trickster spinning false images so convincing that all senses believe the lie.
Transmuter
A matter-reshaping adept turning stone to bread or iron to silver with a touch.
Healer
Warm hands channeling restorative magic through touch, mending wounds and curing fevers.
Beast Master
A predator-eyed binder of wolves, hawks, and bears through a commanding magical bond.
Animal Speaker
A chirp-and-growl translator conversing with creatures in their own tongues.
Dragonrider
A wind-whipped rider bonded to a dragon, taking to the sky with lance in hand.
Familiar Keeper
A never-alone practitioner sharing senses and magic with a bonded creature at their side.
Spellsword
A crackling-blade fighter where steel and sorcery meet in every lethal swing.
Warmage
A formation-targeting caster raining area-of-effect spells on enemies from behind friendly lines.
Spirit Medium
A candle-lit channeler lending their voice to the restless dead in darkened rooms.
Curse Breaker
A hex-unraveling specialist dispelling malicious enchantments from people and places.
Spellmonger
A cluttered-shop dealer selling spell components, scrolls, and enchanted trinkets.
Planar Walker
A portal-stepping traveler moving between worlds and dimensions through shimmering gates.
Dream Walker
A sleeping-mind invader shaping or spying on the dreams of others.
Miracle Worker
A light-wreathed healer laying hands on the incurable and performing feats that defy explanation.
Crystal Reader
A sphere-gazing seer reading images that form in the polished depths of a crystal ball.
Palm Reader
A line-tracing interpreter of a client's hand, reading life, heart, and fate.
Card Reader
A painted-deck shuffler laying out spreads that hint at past, present, and future.
Bone Reader
A knucklebone-casting diviner reading meaning from the patterns they form on cloth.
Tea Leaf Reader
A cup-swirling interpreter finding shapes and omens in the dregs of wet tea leaves.
Dream Interpreter
A symbol-teasing listener drawing meaning from troubled sleepers' tangled visions.
Omen Reader
A sky-watching interpreter of bird flights, eclipses, and strange births for signs to come.
Weather Prophet
A wind-sniffing forecaster studying cloud shapes and predicting storms days in advance.
Mystic
An ecstatic seeker pursuing communion with forces beyond mortal understanding.
Wise Woman
A cottage-doorstep counselor mixing herb remedies, reading omens, and advising villagers.
Wise Man
A long-bearded elder offering hard-won wisdom on disputes, illness, and strange happenings.
Soul Keeper
A passage-guarding sentinel ensuring departed souls transition safely to the afterlife.
Guardian Angel
An unseen watcher deflecting curses and ill luck from a charge they shadow.
Animal Controller
An arcane-word whisperer calming rampaging beasts and redirecting them from settlements.
Beast Tamer
A whip-and-enchantment breaker of wild and magical creatures, patient yet unyielding.
Secret Keeper
A magically oath-bound guardian of dangerous knowledge, revealing it only when conditions are met.
